clusters.justification: This domain represents the processing of subjective emotional states and physiological arousal, mediated by limbic and salience networks to handle emotionally significant stimuli.
This domain reflects the computation of subjective utility and motivational drive, supported by striato-cortical circuitry to guide goal-directed choice and reward appraisal.
This domain captures internally-directed abstract representations of oneself and other agents, engaging the default mode network to construct complex social and personal narratives.
